title: FDA Adverse Events Scraper - Input
description: Search FDA Adverse Event Reporting System (FAERS) for drug safety signals, adverse reactions, and safety reports. Access drug safety data that pharmaceutical companies pay premium prices for. No API key required.

mode.sectionDescription: Select what type of adverse event data to search for: general search, drug-focused, reaction-focused, or date range analysis.
mode.title: Scraping mode
mode.description: Select the type of search: general events, drug-specific, reaction-specific, or date range analysis.
enumTitles: Search by Drug (drug name, brand, generic)

query.sectionDescription: Define your search criteria. Choose drug names, reactions, or general keywords to find relevant adverse event reports.
query.title: General search query
query.description: General keyword search across all adverse event fields (drug names, reactions, descriptions).

drugName.title: Drug name
drugName.description: Medicinal product name (brand or generic). For search_by_drug mode. Example: 'LIPITOR', 'atorvastatin'

brandName.title: Brand name
brandName.description: Commercial brand name of the drug. Example: 'LIPITOR', 'PROZAC', 'VIAGRA'

genericName.title: Generic name
genericName.description: Generic/chemical name of the drug. Example: 'atorvastatin', 'fluoxetine', 'sildenafil'

reaction.title: Adverse reaction
reaction.description: Specific adverse reaction or side effect to search for. Required for search_by_reaction mode. Example: 'myocardial infarction', 'headache', 'nausea'

dateFrom.title: Date from
dateFrom.description: Start date for adverse events (YYYYMMDD format). Required for search_by_date_range mode. Example: '20220101'

dateTo.title: Date to
dateTo.description: End date for adverse events (YYYYMMDD format). Required for search_by_date_range mode. Example: '20231231'

seriousOnly.sectionDescription: Apply additional filters to focus on specific types of adverse events.
seriousOnly.title: Serious events only
seriousOnly.description: Filter to show only serious adverse events (death, hospitalization, life-threatening, disability, congenital anomaly).

country.title: Country
country.description: Filter by country code where the event occurred. Example: 'US', 'CA', 'GB', 'DE'

maxResults.sectionDescription: Control how many adverse event reports are returned.
maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of adverse event reports to return (1-1000). Free users are limited to 25 per run.

requestIntervalSecs.title: Request interval (seconds)
requestIntervalSecs.description: Minimum seconds between API requests. Lower is faster but may trigger rate limits.

timeoutSecs.title: HTTP timeout (seconds)
timeoutSecs.description: Timeout for each HTTP request to the openFDA API.

maxRetries.title: Max retries
maxRetries.description: Maximum retry attempts on failed or rate-limited requests.
